jobs.prompt: Pixel art animation sprite strip: exactly 2 frames arranged in a single horizontal row (1x2 grid), 2 equal-width columns, one monster per column, generous empty magenta space between and around the columns, no drop shadows on the background. The SAME monster appears in both frames at the same size: the green slime with a happy face shown in the small reference sprite - a rounded blob with a flat-ish top and a tiny sprout antenna, NOT teardrop-shaped, no pointed drip tip on top, big cute eyes and a glossy highlight on the upper left. The 2 frames form a bouncing hop cycle: (1) squashed slightly wide and flat against the ground, (2) stretched slightly tall mid-hop. Bottom of the slime on the same invisible ground line in both frames.
